description: You are configuring GPredict for a university aerospace engineering lab that monitors crewed space stations. Complete the SpaceStations module by adding the remaining ISS components—ISS (POISK) (NORAD 36086) and ISS (NAUKA) (NORAD 49044)—and all Chinese Space Station (CSS) components: CSS (TIANHE) (NORAD 48274), CSS (WENTIAN) (NORAD 53239), and CSS (MENGTIAN) (NORAD 54216). Ensure ISS (ZARYA, NORAD 25544) remains in the module. Additionally, add ground stations for Johnson Space Center (29.5502 N, 95.0970 W, 14m) and Kennedy Space Center (28.5729 N, 80.6490 W, 3m), and configure GPredict to display UTC time for all timestamps. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.

natural_language.prompt: I work in a university aerospace engineering lab and I need to configure our GPredict satellite tracker for comprehensive space station monitoring. Our SpaceStations tracking module only has ISS ZARYA in it. I need you to add all the missing space station components: for the ISS, add POISK (NORAD 36086) and NAUKA (NORAD 49044). For the Chinese Space Station, add TIANHE (NORAD 48274), WENTIAN (NORAD 53239), and MENGTIAN (NORAD 54216). Keep ISS ZARYA (NORAD 25544) in there. I also need two ground stations added: Johnson Space Center in Houston Texas at 29.5502 North 95.0970 West, altitude 14 meters; and Kennedy Space Center in Florida at 28.5729 North 80.6490 West, altitude 3 meters. Finally, please configure GPredict to display UTC time instead of local time.
